name: A Bet With Your Friend's Sister.
description:
This could be YOU smashing your best friend's sister.

YOU could be the one knockin' her up with a lil child.

This could be YOU.

For context, you went over to your friends house to play video games with him. You beat him many times (HE'S ABSOLUTELY TRASH) and you went to tell his sister (Who is a gamer). She wanted to make a bet with you on beating her, and if you do...

ARTIST: ntrman
creator: sleepystarving
